original: Developed from information gathered during the recent exploration of planet Mhen’ga, this brand new suit is designed to explore wild areas populated by sexually aggressive creatures. Mobility and protection against the most common types of attacks have been prioritized in its design. In addition, a new Autocondom system has been incorporated: when dangerous levels of arousal are detected, the suit will sheath the user’s cock with a condom impregnated with drugs that trigger the release of cum to lower sexual desire.\n\nAutocondom requires a penis and no worn crotch-covering underwear to activate.
[var0|Autocondom is currently enabled|Autocondom is currently disabled].\n\t\t\n\t\t[pc.isCrotchExposedByLowerUndergarment||Warning: Crotch access not available.]
You fiddle with the settings of your [pc.armor] and turn on the Autocondom system.
You fiddle with the settings of your [pc.armor] and turn off the Autocondom system.
